reasoning: The Comments History section contains a critical fraud alert stating: 'FRAUD ALERT: Customer has 11 refunds in 73 days. ALL claims are 'item not received' but tracking confirms delivery. The current claim of 'Wrong size/color sent' aligns with previous suspicious claims. Per protocol, this requires escalation to Loss Prevention rather than direct approval/denial.
